ddt:Target.Name: ClimBoxGen4FOTA_SW6v4
ddt:Target.Description: The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DEASIC4/65692/UET Modelisation BCM) 2020.10.09 - Creation

Data.Name: CH_CountryType
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Zone 1 02d : Zone 2 03d : Zone 3 04d : Zone 4

Data.Name: CH_EngineType
Data.Comment: 00d : Not Configured 01d : Thermic engine 02d : Stop & Start Engine 03d : Electrical engine 05d : Thermic Nissan engine 06d : Hybrid Nissan engine 07d : Diesel Nissan engine 08d : Gasoline Nissan engine 09d : Hybrid Renault engine

Item.Text: Do not use memory for manual FRE

Data.Name: CH_ISComfortable
Data.Comment: 0b : consider climate comfotable for idle stop permition judgement 1b : no consider climate comfotable for idle stop permition judgement

Data.Name: CH_ISFandown
Data.Comment: 0b : FAN voltage down for idle stop time duration 1b : no FAN voltage down for idle stop

Data.Name: CH_ISIntake
Data.Comment: 0b : permit intake change to REC for idle stop time duration 1b : no intake change for idle stop

Item.Text: Do not use memory for manual REC

Data.Name: CH_SetFeetVentToDEF
Data.Comment: 00b: DEF door open when auto, DEF door closed when manual 01b: DEF door open when auto, DEF door open when manual 10b: DEF door closed when auto, DEF door open when manual 11b: DEF door closed when auto, DEF door closed when manual

Item.Text: DEF door open when auto - DEF door closed when manual
DEF door open when auto - DEF door open when manual
DEF door closed when auto - DEF door open when manual
DEF door closed when auto - DEF door closed when manual

Data.Name: CH_WithAirHVPTC
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Air HV PTC 02d : With Air HV PTC Low 03d : With Air HV PTC High

Data.Name: CH_WithBatteryHeating
Data.Comment: 0d: Not configured 1d: Without Battery heating 2d: With Battery heating

Data.Name: CH_WithCompressor
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without compressor 02d : With compressor (external ctrl with cluctch) 03d : With compressor (external ctrl without cluctch) 04d : With compressor (internal ctrl with cluctch) 05d : With compressor (fixed ctrl with cluctch) 06d : With compressor (electrical)

Data.Name: CH_WithCoolantTempSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without engine coolant temp sensor 2d: With Coolant Temp Sensor on engine 3d: With Coolant Temp Sensor on heater core input 4d: With Coolant Temp Sensor on boiler output

Item.Text: 2d - With Coolant Temp Sensor on engine
3d - With Coolant Temp Sensor on heater core input
4d - WithWith Coolant Temp Sensor on boiler output

Data.Name: CH_WithECOModeClim
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Eco Mode Clim 02d : With Eco Mode Clim

Data.Name: CH_WithESM
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without ESM 02d : With ESM

Data.Name: CH_WithFrontDefroster
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Front Defroster 02d : With Front Defroster

Data.Name: CH_WithHeaterCore
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Heater Core 02d : With Heater Core

Data.Name: CH_WithHeatPump
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Heat pump 02d : With Heat pump inner cond 03d : With Heat pump schiller

Data.Name: CH_WithHeatPumpECU
Data.Comment: 0d: Not configured 1d: Without HeatPump ECU 2d: With HeatPump ECU

Data.Name: CH_WithHeatRecovery
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without heat recovery 2d: With heat recovery

Data.Name: CH_WithHVBattCond
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without HV Batt Cond 02d : With HV Batt Cond by Air 03d : With HV Batt Cond by Water 04d : With HV Batt Cond by Refrigerant 05d : With SED type 4

Item.Text: 2d - With HV Batt Cond by Air
3d - With HV Batt Cond by Water

Data.Name: CH_WithHVPTCBattery
Data.Comment: 0d: Not configured 1d: Without HV PTC battery 2d: With HV PTC battery

Data.Name: CH_WithLDB
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without LDB 02d : With LDB

Data.Name: CH_WithLVHeater
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without LV PTC - Without THP 02d : With LV PTC Low - Without THP 03d : With LV PTC High - Without THP 04d : With LV PTC Low - With THP 05d : With LV PTC High - With THP 06d : Without LV PTC - With THP

Item.Text: 2d - With LV PTC Low - Without THP
3d - With LV PTC High - Without THP
4d - With LV PTC Low - With THP
5d - With LV PTC High - With THP

Data.Name: CH_WithPreCond
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Precond 02d : With Precond

Data.Name: CH_WithSaS
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Stop&Start 02d : With Stop&Start

Data.Name: CH_WithSeatsHeating
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Seats heating 02d : With Seats heating

Data.Name: CH_WithSED
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without SED 02d : With SED type 1 03d : With SED type 2 04d : With SED type 3 05d : With SED type 4

Data.Name: CH_WithWaterHVPTC
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without Water HV PTC 02d : With Water HV PTC Low 03d : With Water HV PTC High

Data.Name: CH_WithWEP
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Without WEP 02d : With WEP type 1 03d : With WEP type 2

Data.Name: CL_ACType
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Manual Monozone 2d: Heater - Chauffo 16d: Monozone Regulated - CAREG MZ 17d: Dualzone without rear vent ducts 18d: Dualzone with rear vent ducts 19d: Trizone with temperature 20d: Trizone with temperature and with distribution 21d: Dualzone with additional rear monozone 22d: Monozone Regulated - with rear blowers

Item.Text: 20d - Trizone with temperature and with distribution

Data.Name: CL_CANArchitecture
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Renault T4 10d: Nissan C1N 12d: Renault-Nissan C1A 13d: Renault-Nissan C1A HS

Data.Name: CL_CompValveType
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Comp valve 2d: With Comp valve type 1 3d: With Comp valve type 2

Data.Name: CH_SteeringType
Data.Comment: 00d : Not configured 01d : Right Hand Drive Steering 02d : Left Hand Drive Steering

Data.Name: CL_WithAirQualitySensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Sensor type 1 - Renault AQS 3d: With Sensor type 2 - Nissan PWM AQS

Data.Name: CL_WithBlowerFanFeedback
Data.Comment: 0h: Not Configured 1h: Without Feedback 2h: With Feedback type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithBlowerOutput
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without HVAC blower output 2d: With HVAC blower output type 1 (500Hz PWM) 3d: With HVAC blower output type 2 (35Hz PWM)

Item.Text: 2d - With HVAC blower output type 1 - 500Hz PWM
3d - With HVAC blower output type 2 - 35Hz PWM

Data.Name: CL_WithBoiler
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Boiler 2d: With Boiler Type 1 3d: With Boiler Type 2 4d: With Boiler Type 3

Data.Name: CL_WithControlPanel
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without CP 2d: With CP type 1 3d: With CP type 2 4d: With CP type 3 5d: With CP type 4 6d: With CP type 5 7d: With CP type 6 8d: With CP type 7 9d: With CP type 8 10d: With CP type 9 11d: With CP type 10

Data.Name: CL_WithEPV
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without EPV 2d: With EPV

Data.Name: CL_WithEvapSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Sensor type 1 3d: With Sensor type 2 (P02F) 4d: With Sensor type 3 (Carry-back) 5d: With Sensor type 4 (B02E)

Item.Text: 3d - With sensor type 2 - P02F - Air type
5d- With sensor type 4 - B02E - Air type
7d - With sensor type 6 - P02F - Fin type
8d - With sensor type 7 - B02E - Fin type

Data.Name: CL_WithFragrance
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Fragrance 2d: With Fragrance type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithHeatSeatFrontLeft
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without heating seat 2d: With heating seat type 1 (High & Low)

Data.Name: CL_WithHeatSeatFrontRight
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without heating seat 2d: With 2 relays high-low heating seat B02E 3d: With 2 relays high-low heating seat L21B

Item.Text: 2d - With 2 relays high-low heating seats B02E
3d - With 2 relays high-low heating seats L21B

Data.Name: CL_WithHEVSensor1
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Sensor type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithHEVSensor2
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Sensor type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithHotSourceSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Sensor type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithHumiditySensor
Data.Comment: 1h: Without sensor 2h: With local sensor Type 1 (Renault) 3h: With local sensor Type 2

Data.Name: CL_WithInCarTempSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Renault sensor 3d: With Nissan sensor 4d: with R/N sensor with FAN

Data.Name: CL_WithIonizer
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Inonizer 2d: With Inonizer type 1 3d: With Inonizer type 2

Data.Name: CL_WithLINBus1
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: No slave 3d: CI2 7d: CI2 + PTC 121d : ACTR1..4 123d : CI2 + ACTR1..4

Data.Name: CL_WithLINBus2
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: No slave 3d: Front Control Panel 7d: Front Control Panel + Blower 15d: Front Control Panel + Blower + RCP

Item.Text: Blower + Actr1 + Actr2 + Actr3 + Actr4 + Actr5
Blower + Actr1 + Actr2 + Actr3 + Actr4 + Actr5 + Actr6
Blower + Actr1 + Actr2 + Actr3 + Actr4 + Actr5 + Actr6 + Actr7
Blower + Actr1 + Actr2 + Actr3 + Actr4 + Actr5 + Actr6 + Actr7 + Actr8

Data.Name: CL_WithLINMotors
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: No slave 3d: DC LIN 5d: Stepper LIN

Data.Name: CL_WithRearBlowerOutput
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without rear blower output 2d: With rear blower output

Data.Name: CL_WithRearBlowerSwitch
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without rear blower switch 2d: With rear blower bistable switch

Data.Name: CL_WithRearControlPanel
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without RCP 2d: With RCP type 1 3d: With RCP type 2 4d: With RCP type 3 5d: With RCP type 4 6d: With RCP type 5 7d: With RCP type 6 8d: With RCP type 7 9d: With RCP type 8 10d: With RCP type 9 11d: With RCP type 10

Item.Text: 20d - Trizone with temperature and with distribution

Data.Name: CL_WithRearInCarTempSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Renault sensor 3d: With Nissan sensor

Data.Name: CL_WithRightSolarSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without sensor 2d: With Nissan sensor 3d: With Renault sensor 4d: With Left sensor (Single Wire)

Data.Name: CL_WithSolarSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Sensor 2d: With Sensor type 1 (Nissan) 3d: With Sensor type 2 (Renault) 4d: With Left sensor (Single Wire)

Data.Name: CL_WithSteeringHeater
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without steering heater 2d: With relay output without switch 3d: With relay output with switch 4d : With relay output without switch : Auto control

Item.Text: 4d : With relay output without switch : Auto control

Data.Name: CL_WithValve1Output
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Valve 2d: With Valve type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithValve2Output
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Valve 2d: With Valve type 1

Data.Name: CL_WithWaterpump
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Waterpump 2d: With Waterpump type 1 3d: With Waterpump type 2

Data.Name: CL_WithWindshieldHeating1
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Windshield Heating Relay 1 2d: With Windshield Heating Relay 1 type 1 (relay on (relay on OnOff_OUTPUT_3)

Data.Name: CL_WithWindshieldHeating2
Data.Comment: 0d: Not Configured 1d: Without Windshield Heating Relay 2 2d: With Windshield Heating Relay 2 type 1 (relay on (relay on OnOff_OUTPUT_4)

Data.Name: IH_AirbagCrashOrder
Data.Comment: 00d: Crash not detected 15d: Medium crash 31d: Violent crash 47d: Rear crash

Data.Name: IH_AirCondEcoActivationRequest2
Data.Comment: 0d: No request 1d: Eco activation request 2d: Eco deactivation request 3d: Reset request

Data.Name: IH_AutocalIndic
Data.Comment: 0h: No autoindexing 1h: General Autoindexing in progress

Data.Name: IH_BatteryThermalPriorityRequest
Data.Comment: 0b: No request 1b: Traction battery cooling priority request

Data.Name: IH_BatteryWatterTempActivationReq
Data.Comment: 0b: No request 1b: Requestn battery cooling priority request

Data.Name: IH_BatVEShutdownAlert
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: No +BatVE shutdown alert 2h: +BatVE shutdown alert 3h: Not used

Data.Name: IH_BCM_PresoakRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: Immediat Presoak Request 1d: Programmed Presoak Request 2d: Presoak Stop 3d: Unavailable

Data.Name: IH_BlowerLevelReq
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: +3 Click 2h: +2 Click 3h: +1 Click 4h: +0 Click 5h: -1 Click 6h: -2 Click 7h: -3 Click

Data.Name: IH_COMPR_ON_permission
Data.Comment: 0d: Compressor ON forbidden 1d: Compressor ON authorized

Data.Name: IH_CoolingFanSpeedStatus
Data.Comment: 0h: Stopped 1h: Low speed 2h: Mid speed 3h: High speed

Item.Text: Day time according light level s
Night time according to light le

Data.Name: IH_DistRotaryReq
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: +3 Click 2h: +2 Click 3h: +1 Click 4h: +0 Click 5h: -1 Click 6h: -2 Click 7h: -3 Click

Data.Name: IH_eACinsulationAuthorization
Data.Comment: 0d: eAC not allowed 1d: eAC forced insulation mode 2d: eAC nominal mode allowed 3d: Not used

Data.Name: IH_EcoModeRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: Eco mode requested 2h: Eco mode not requested 3h: Not used

Data.Name: IH_EcompStatus
Data.Comment: 0d: Comp OFF 1d: Comp ON 2d: Comp degraded 3d: Comp stopped 4d: Comp shutdown 5d: Comp out of range

Data.Name: IH_EEM_StaticPowerLimitationRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No Request 1d: Life on Board Low SOC power limitation 2d: Delivery Mode power limitation 3d: Battery Disconnection power limitation 4d: Producer failure power limitation 5d-7d: Not used

Data.Name: IH_EngineCoolantFlowStatus
Data.Comment: 0h: Unvailable Value 1h: No EngineCoolantFlow 2h: EngineCoolantFlow 3h: Not Used

Data.Name: IH_EngineFanSpeedRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: No engine fan speed request 1h: Low speed engine fan speed request 2h: Mid speed engine fan speed request 3h: High speed engine fan speed request

Data.Name: IH_EngineHoodState
Data.Comment: 0b00: Unvailable value 0b01: Hood opened 0b10: Hood closed 0b11: Not used

Data.Name: IH_EngineStatus_R
Data.Comment: 0h: Stopped 1h: Not Used 2h: Running engine 3h: Engine driven

Data.Name: IH_EngineStatusForClim
Data.Comment: 0h: Stopped 1h: Not Used 2h: Running engine 3h: Engine driven

Data.Name: IH_EngineStopOrigine
Data.Comment: 0000b: No engine stop request 0001b: Engine stopped by other cause 0010b: Engine stopped by normal system request 0011b: Engine stopped by other cause OR Engine stopped by normal system request 0100b: Engine stopped by normal driver request 0101b: En

Data.Name: IH_FeetVentActrPosition
Data.Comment: Represents the % of total range [min - max]

Data.Name: IH_HEVC_PresoakRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: Immediate presoak request 1h: Programmed presoak request 2h: Presoak stop 3h: Unavailable

Data.Name: IH_HPM_ClimLoopMode
Data.Comment: 0d: Unavailable 1d: AC Mode 2d: AC deicing mode 3d: AC to heat pump mode 4d: Heat pump mode 5d: Heat pump to AC mode 6d: Not used 7d: Idle mode

Data.Name: IH_HVbatHeater_Authorization
Data.Comment: 0b0: No autorisation of high voltage battery heater 0b1: Autorisation of high voltage battery heater

Item.Text: No autorisation of high voltage battery heater
Autorisation of high voltage battery heater

Data.Name: IH_HVPTC_ON_permission
Data.Comment: 0b: High voltage heater (PTC) forbidden 1b: High voltage heater (PTC) authorization

Data.Name: IH_HVPTCHeaterCircuit1Off
Data.Comment: 0b: Normal running 1b: Heater circuit 1 permanent off

Data.Name: IH_HVPTCHeaterCircuit2Off
Data.Comment: 0b: Normal running 1b: Heater circuit 2 permanent off

Data.Name: IH_HVPTCHeaterCircuit3Off
Data.Comment: 0b: Normal running 1b: Heater circuit 3 permanent off

Data.Name: IH_HVPTCHeaterCircuit4Off
Data.Comment: 0b: Normal running 1b: Heater circuit 4 permanent off

Data.Name: IH_IoniserAutoLaunchReq2
Data.Comment: 0d: No request 1d: Activation request 2d: Deactivation request 3d: Reset request

Data.Name: IH_ISS_EcoActivationRequest2
Data.Comment: 0d: No request 1d: Eco activation request 2d: Eco deactivation request 3d: Reset request

Data.Name: IH_ISSAP
Data.Comment: 0h: Vehicle equipped without I/S system 1h: Vehicle equipped with I/S system

Data.Name: IH_LeftTempReq
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: +3 Click 2h: +2 Click 3h: +1 Click 4h: +0 Click 5h: -1 Click 6h: -2 Click 7h: -3 Click

Data.Name: IH_PreSoakTempReq_MMI
Data.Comment: 0d: No request 1d: Change cabin temperature target 2d: Reset cabin temperature target requested 3d: Not used

Data.Name: IH_PTCNumberThermalStatus
Data.Comment: 0d: 0 PTC activated 1d: 1 PTC activated ... 10d: 10 PTC activated 11d: Not used .. 14d: Not used 15d: Unavailable

Data.Name: IH_RearDefrostEngaged
Data.Comment: 0h: Rear Defrost not engaged 1h: Rear Defrost engaged

Data.Name: IH_RearMixActrPosition
Data.Comment: Represents the % of total range [min - max]

Data.Name: IH_RearModeActrPosition
Data.Comment: Represents the % of total range [min - max]

Data.Name: IH_RecyActrPosition
Data.Comment: Represents the % of total range [min - max]

Data.Name: IH_RightMixActrPosition
Data.Comment: Represents the % of total range [min - max]

Data.Name: IH_RightTempReq
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: +3 Click 2h: +2 Click 3h: +1 Click 4h: +0 Click 5h: -1 Click 6h: -2 Click 7h: -3 Click

Data.Name: IH_SteeringHeaterPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0h: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1h: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: IH_StopAutoForClim
Data.Comment: 0h: Vehicle not in automatic state 1h: Vehicle in automatic state

Data.Name: IH_UnballastRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: No request 1h: Load Cut Off For life On Board 2h: Load Cut Off For life On Board 2 3h: Reserved for Safety 4h: Load Cut Off For Pulse Compatibility 5h: Load Cut off level 1 6h: Load Cut off level 2 7h: Load Cut off level 3

Data.Name: IH_VehicleOutsideLockedToggle
Data.Comment: 0h: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1h: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: IH_VehicleStateForClim
Data.Comment: 0h: Sleeping 1h: CutOffPending 2h: BatTempoLevel 3h: Blower Available 4h: Starting in Progress 5h: Engine Running 6h: Not Used 7h: Unavailable

Data.Name: IH_VehicleTractionMode
Data.Comment: 0: Vehicle not in traction mode 1: Vehicle in charge 2: Vehicle in full electric mode 3: Vehicle in hybrid serial mode 4: Vehicle in thermic mode 5: Vehicle in hybrid parallel mode 6: Unavailable value 7: Unavailable value

Data.Name: IH_WaterHeaterLoopModeStatus
Data.Comment: 0b: Large Loop with ICE Engine 1b: Short Loop without ICE Engine

Data.Name: IH_WiperState
Data.Comment: 0h: Unvailable value 1h: Front wiper stopped 2h: Front wiper active 3h: Not used

Data.Name: ILB_AQS_ExternalAirPollutionLevel
Data.Comment: 0 :Air Quality Level 0% 1 :Air Quality Level 10% 2 :Air Quality Level 20% 3 :Air Quality Level 30% 4 :Air Quality Level 40% 5 :Air Quality Level 50% 6 :Air Quality Level 60% 7 :Air Quality Level 70% 8 :Air Quality Level 80% 9 :Air Quality Level 90% 10 :Air Quality Level 100% 11 :Not mounted 12 :Init 13 :Error 14 :Not used 15 :Not used

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_CompStatus
Data.Comment: 0d: Comp OFF 1d: Comp ON 2d: Comp degraded 3d: Comp stopped 4d: Comp shutdown 5d: Comp out of range

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_ErrorSensor
Data.Comment: 0d: No error 1d: Temperature-sensor error 2d: Current-sensor error 3d: Reserved

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_HighVoltageFault
Data.Comment: 0d: No error 1d: Under High Voltage 2d: Over High Voltage 3d: Abnormal High Voltage

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_InternalError
Data.Comment: 0d: No error 1d: Output Line Short Circuit 2d: Output Line Open Circuit 3d: Over Load 4d: Abnormal Run-up 5d-6d: Reserved 7d: CPU error

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_LimitedOperation
Data.Comment: 0 :No error 1 :Current Limited Operation 2 :Voltage Limited Operation 3 :Power Limited Operation

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_MotorControlFault
Data.Comment: 0: No error 1: Start Fail 2: Software Over Current 3: Reserved

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_OverLoadWarning
Data.Comment: 0: No error 1: Over Load Warning (Area1) 2: Over Load Warning (Area2) 3: Low Speed Over Load

Data.Name: ILB_CI2_TempFault
Data.Comment: 0 :No error 1 :Over heat warning 2 :Over heat 3 :Low temperature warning

Data.Name: ILB_FP_Switch2APushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchAPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchBPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchCPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchDPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchEPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchFPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchGPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchHPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchJPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchKPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchLPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchMPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchNPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchPPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchRPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchSPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchTPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchUPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchVPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchWPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchXPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchYPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_FP_SwitchZPushToggle
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: ILB_HPM2_AirShutterRequest
Data.Comment: 0 : No request 1 : Open 2 : Close 3 : not used

Data.Name: ILB_HPM2_BatteryCoolingRequest
Data.Comment: 0 : No cooling request 1 : Battery cooling request

Data.Name: ILB_HPM2_ClimLoopMode
Data.Comment: 0 :Unavailable 1 :A/C MODE 2 :SERIES DEMISTING MODE 3 :PARALLEL DEMISTING MODE 4 :HEAT PUMP MODE 5 :A/C DE-ICING MODE 6 :IDLE MODE 7 :INITIALIZE MODE 8 :IDLE SHIFT / IDLE_SHIfT_MODE 9 :UNSTABLE MODE 10 :NOT USED 11 :NOT USED 12 :NOT USED 13 :NOT USED 14 :NOT USED 15 :NOT USED

Data.Name: ILB_HPM2_DiagStatus
Data.Comment: 0 :normal 1 :only heating possible 2 :only heating & battery possible 3 :only cooler possible 4 :only cooler & battery possible 5 :only battery possible 6 :only heating & cooler possible 7 :no operation possible

Data.Name: ILN_GenericApplicativeDiagEnable
Data.Comment: 0h: Diag frozen 1h: All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled 2h: All faults reports and alerts 3h: Unavailable

Item.Text: Only faults reports and alerts t
All faults reports and alerts n
All faults reports and alerts a

Data.Name: ILN_HVcoolingLoopValveStatus
Data.Comment: 0b00: Unavailable 0b01: Electrical power unit to the chiller/battery 0b10: Electrical power unit to the radiator 0b11: Not used

Item.Text: Electrical power unit to the radiator
Electrical power unit to the chiller/battery

Data.Name: ILN_ProbableCustomerFeedBackNeed
Data.Comment: 0b0: Customer feedback probably not needed 0b1: Customer feedback needed

Data.Name: ILW_AnalogInput_4
Data.Comment: 0b: Transition from 1 means switch pressed 1b: Transition from 0 means switch pressed

Data.Name: OH_AC_CustomerRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No AC customer request 1d: AC customer request

Data.Name: OH_AC_StopAutoForbidden
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: Auto Stop forbidden 2h: Auto stop authorized 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OH_ACCompClutchRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: No AC compressor requested 1h: AC compressor requested

Data.Name: OH_ACCompRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: No Air Conditioning requested 1h: Air Conditioning requested

Data.Name: OH_ACCompRequest_IOCommand
Data.Comment: 0h: No Air Conditioning requested 1h: Air Conditioning requested

Data.Name: OH_ACCoolingFanSpeedRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: No engine fan speed request 1h: Low speed engine fan speed request 2h: Mid speed engine fan speed request 3h: High speed engine fan speed request

Data.Name: OH_AirShutterClosingRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No air shutters closure request 1d: Air shutters closure request

Data.Name: OH_AirShutterOpeningRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No air shutters opening request 1d: Air shutters opening request

Data.Name: OH_BlowerFanMotorStatus_AC
Data.Comment: 0h: Blower fan motor off 1h: Blower fan motor on

Data.Name: OH_BlowerLevelDisplay
Data.Comment: 0d: No display 1d: Blower level 1 2d: Blower level 2 3d: Blower level 3 4d: Blower level 4 5d: Blower level 5 6d: Blower level 6 7d: Blower level 7 8d: Blower level 8 9d: Blower level 9 10d: Blower level 10 11d: Blower level 11 12d: Blower lev

Data.Name: OH_CabinCondDuringCharge_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No Cabin Conditionning during charge requested 1: Cabin conditionning during charge on going 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_ClimAQSActivationState
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: activated 2h: not activated 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OH_ClimAT_EcoCustomAllowed
Data.Comment: 0b: Clim AT EcoCustomize Inhibit 1b: Clim AT EcoCustomize Allowed

Data.Name: OH_ClimFlowDistrDisplay
Data.Comment:
1: FA 2: AA 3: FA + AA 4: MFA 5: FA + MFA 6: AA + MFA 7: FA + AA + MFA 8: DA 9: FA + DA 10: AA + DA 11: FA + AA + DA 12: MFA + DA 13: FA + MFA + DA 14: AA + MFA + DA 15: FA + AA + MFA + DA
Legendary: FA: Feet Arrow AA: Aerator Arrow MFA: Mild flow Arrow DA: Defrost Arrow

Data.Name: OH_ClimLoopMode
Data.Comment: 0d: Unavailable 1d: AC mode 2d: AC deicing mode 3d: Not used 4d: Heat pump mode 5d: Not used 6d: Demisting mode 7d: Idle mode

Data.Name: OH_CoolerHilimitRequestForCVT
Data.Comment: 0b: Cooler Hilimit not requested 1b: Cooler Hilimit requested

Data.Name: OH_CoolingBattery_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No battery cooling requested 1: Battery cooling on going 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_CoolingModeRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No cooling mode requested 1d: Cooling mode 2d: Heating mode 3d: Demisting 4d-7d: Not Used

Data.Name: OH_DeIcing_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No De_Icing requested 1: De_Icing requested 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_EcompShutdownReq
Data.Comment: If C1A HS: 0d0 : eCOMP switched on 0d1 : eCOMP switched off If C1A : 0b: Shutdown OFF 1b: Shutdown ON

Data.Name: OH_FrontDefrostEngaged
Data.Comment: 0h: Front defrost not engaged 1h: Front defrost engaged

Data.Name: OH_HeatingBattery_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No battery heating requested 1: Battery heating on going 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontLeftHighReq
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat high relay not requested 1: Heating seat high relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontLeftHighReq_IOCommand
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat high relay not requested 1: Heating seat high relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontLeftLowReq
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat low relay not requested 1: Heating seat low relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontLeftLowReq_IOCommand
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat low relay not requested 1: Heating seat low relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontRightHighReq
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat high relay not requested 1: Heating seat high relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontRightHighReq_IOCommand
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat high relay not requested 1: Heating seat high relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontRightLowReq
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat low relay not requested 1: Heating seat low relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HeatSeatFrontRightLowReq_IOCommand
Data.Comment: 0: Heating seat low relay not requested 1: Heating seat low relay requested

Data.Name: OH_HPM_DeicePermission
Data.Comment: 0d: Unavailable 1d: De-ice not permitted 2d: De-ice permitted 3d: Not Used

Data.Name: OH_HPM_DeiceVehicleRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No de-ice vehicle request 1d: De-ice vehicle state 1 request : battery loading 2d: De-ice vehicle state 2 request : preconditionning 3d: De-ice vehicle state 3 request : high speed driving 4d: De-ice vehicle state 4 request : idle state driving 5d: De-ice vehicle state 5 request : low battery SOC 6d-7d: Not Used

Item.Text: De-ice vehicle state 1 request : battery loading
De-ice vehicle state 3 request : high speed driving
De-ice vehicle state 4 request : idle state driving
De-ice vehicle state 5 request : low battery SOC

Data.Name: OH_HPM_HeatingModeRequest
Data.Comment: 0d: No heating mode requested 1d: Thermal comfort 2d: Preconditionning 3d: Battery Heating 4d-7d: Not Used

Item.Text: De-ice vehicle state 1 request : battery loading
De-ice vehicle state 3 request : high speed driving
De-ice vehicle state 4 request : idle state driving
De-ice vehicle state 5 request : low battery SOC

Data.Name: OH_HVAC_ZEVmodeICEngineStartRequest
Data.Comment: 0b: No ICE engine starting request for ZEV mode 1b: ICE engine starting request for ZEV mode

Data.Name: OH_HVbatConditioningMode
Data.Comment: 0b0000: No request 0b0001: Cooling by Chiller 0b0010: Heating Recovery 0b0011: Heating by PTC 0b0100: Battery Range Boost 0b0101: Cooling by Radiator 0b0110: Not used 0b0111: Not used 0b1000: Not used 0b1001: Not used 0b1010: Not used 0b1011: Not used 0b1100: Not used 0b1101: Not used 0b1110: Not used 0b1111: Not used

Data.Name: OH_HVeACComp_FaultType
Data.Comment:
0d: No failure and eAC ON 1d: No failure and eAC OFF 2d: Downgraded mode for eAC 3d: Failure mode for eAC
4d: eAC to be Change
5d-6d: Not used 7d: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_HVPTC_FaultType
Data.Comment:
0d: No failure and HV PTC ON 1d: No failure and HV PTC OFF 2d: Downgraded mode for HV PTC 3d: Failure mode for HV PTC
4d: To Change HV PTC
5d-6d: Not used 7d: Unavailable

Item.Text: No failure and HV PTC ON
No failure and HV PTC OFF

Data.Name: OH_LeftTempDisplay
Data.Comment: 0d: No display 1d: Not used 2d: All segments displayed 3d: Not used 4d: Display 0F 5d: Not used 6d: Display -- 7d: Not used 8d: Display L0 9d: Not used 10d: Display HI 11d: 5.5° 12d: 6° ... 60d: 30° 61d: 30.5° 62d: 31° 63d: 31.5° ...

Data.Name: OH_MinimumVoltagebyAC
Data.Comment: Unavailable values: - 13.25V (related to OLN_MinimumVoltagebyAC_CMF1 use) - 15.25V (related to OLN_MinimumVoltagebyAC_T4 use)

Data.Name: OH_PowerSupplyMaintain
Data.Comment: 0d: No need of power supply 1d: HVAC power supply maintain request

Data.Name: OH_PreConditioningBattery_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No Battery Preconditionning requested 1: Battery Preconditionning on going 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_PresoakActivationStatus
Data.Comment: 0d: Presoak forbidden 1d: No presoak in progress 2d: Presoak in progress 3d: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_PresoakImmediate_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No Immediate Presoak Requested 1: Immediate Presoak in progress 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_PresoakProg_HVACmode
Data.Comment: 0: No Presoak Programmed 1: Presoak programmed in progress 2: Not used 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OH_PTCNumberThermalReq
Data.Comment: 0d: 0 PTC requested ... 10d: 10 PTC requested 11d: Not used ... 15d: No request

Data.Name: OH_PumpActivationRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: Unvailable Value 1h: NO Pump Activation Requested 2h: Pump Activation Requested 3h: Not Used

Data.Name: OH_RearDefrostRequest
Data.Comment: 0h: No rear defrost requested 1h: Rear defrost requested

Data.Name: OH_RightTempDisplay
Data.Comment: 0d: No display 1d: Not used 2d: All segments displayed 3d: Not used 4d: Display 0F, 5d: Not used 6d: Display -- 7d: Not used 8d: Display L0 9d: Not used 10d: Display HI 11d: 5.5° 12d: 6° ... 60d: 30° 61d: 30.5° 62d: 31° 63d: 31.5° ...

Data.Name: OH_SailingIdleForbidden
Data.Comment: 00: Unavailable 01: Sailing idle / Clutch opening forbidden 10: Sailing idle / Clutch opening authorized 11: Not used

Data.Name: OH_SteeringHeaterReq
Data.Comment: 0: Steering heater relay not requested 1: Steering heater relay requested

Data.Name: OH_TractionBatteryCoolingLimited
Data.Comment: 0: Not limited 1: Traction battery cooling limited

Data.Name: OLB_FLseat_Request
Data.Comment: 0d :OFF 1d :Heater Low 2d :Heater Middle 3d :Heater High 4d :Ventilated Low 5d :Ventilated Middle 6d :Ventilated High 7d :Not used

Data.Name: OLB_FP_BlowerLevelDisplay
Data.Comment: 0d: No display 1d: Blower level 1 2d: Blower level 2 3d: Blower level 3 4d: Blower level 4 5d: Blower level 5 6d: Blower level 6 7d: Blower level 7 8d: Blower level 8 9d: Blower level 9 10d: Blower level 10 11d: Blower level 11 12d: Blower level 12 13d: Blower level 13 14d: Blower level 14 15d: Blower off display

Data.Name: OLB_FP_DistDisplay
Data.Comment:
1h: FA 2h: AA 3h: FA + AA 4h: MFA 5h: FA + MFA 6h: AA 7h: FA + AA + MFA 8h: DA 9h: FA + DA 10h: AA + DA 11h: FA + AA + DA 12h: MFA + DA 13h: FA + MFA + DA 14h: AA + MFA + DA 15h: FA + AA + MFA +DA
Legendary: FA: Feet Arrow AA: Aerator Arrow MFA: Mild flow Arrow DA: Defrost Arrow

Data.Name: OLB_FP_LeftTempDisplay
Data.Comment: 0d: No display 1d: Not used 2d: All segments displayed 3d: Not used 4d: Display 0F, 5d: Not use

Data.Name: OLB_FRseat_Request
Data.Comment: 0d :OFF 1d :Heater Low 2d :Heater Middle 3d :Heater High 4d :Ventilated Low 5d :Ventilated Middle 6d :Ventilated High 7d :Not used

Data.Name: OLB_HeatPumpSystemVariant
Data.Comment: 0 :With heat pump 1 :Affordable with battery cooling 2 :Affordable without battery cooling 3: Not used

Data.Name: OLB_IgnitionState
Data.Comment:
0h: Before ignition (off or AUTO ACC) (*) 0h: No MMI activation request (**) 1h: Ignition (*) 1h: Wake up MMI requested (**)
Notes: (*): Definition related to OH_IgnitionState use. (**): Definition related to OH_ClimMMIActivationRequest use.

Data.Name: OLB_RP2_TestLamp
Data.Comment: LLS Supplier 0h: No test lamps 1h: Test lamps

Data.Name: OLB_SecondRLseat_Request
Data.Comment: 0d :OFF 1d :Heater Low 2d :Heater Middle 3d :Heater High 4d :Ventilated Low 5d :Ventilated Middle 6d :Ventilated High 7d :Not used

Data.Name: OLB_SecondRRseat_Request
Data.Comment: 0d :OFF 1d :Heater Low 2d :Heater Middle 3d :Heater High 4d :Ventilated Low 5d :Ventilated Middle 6d :Ventilated High 7d :Not used

Data.Name: OLB_ThermalRequestPriority
Data.Comment: 0 :Evaporator - Inner condensor - Battery 1 :Evaporator - Battery - Inner condensor 2 :Inner condensor - Battery - Evaporator 3 :Inner condensor - Evaporator - Battery 4 :Battery - Evaporator - Inner condensor 5 :Battery - Inner condensor - Evaporator 6 :not used 7 :not used

Data.Name: OLB_ThirdRLseat_Request
Data.Comment: 0d :OFF 1d :Heater Low 2d :Heater Middle 3d :Heater High 4d :Ventilated Low 5d :Ventilated Middle 6d :Ventilated High 7d :Not used

Data.Name: OLB_ThirdRRseat_Request
Data.Comment: 0d :OFF 1d :Heater Low 2d :Heater Middle 3d :Heater High 4d :Ventilated Low 5d :Ventilated Middle 6d :Ventilated High 7d :Not used

Data.Name: OLN_AC_eBattPTCInterlockHVConnector
Data.Comment: 0: Not used 1: Interlock Opened 2: Interlock Closed 3: Unavailable

Data.Name: OLN_AC_FlapFrontRightDistriPosition
Data.Comment: 0b0000: Unavailable 0b0001: Feet 0b0010: Aerator 0b0011: Feet + Aerator 0b0100: Mild flow 0b0101: Feet + Mild flow 0b0110: Feet + Aerator Mild flow 0b0111: Defrost 0b1000: Feet + Defrost 0b1001: Aerator + Defrost 0b1010: Feet + Aerator + Defrost 0b1011: Mild flow + Defrost State 0b1100: Feet + Mild flow + Defrost 0b1101: Aerator + Mild flow + Defrost 0b1110: Feet + Aerator + Mild flow + Defrost 0b1111: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimACDisplay
Data.Comment: 0h: No display 1h: AC ON 2h: AC OFF 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimAutoDisplay
Data.Comment: 0h: No display 1h: Auto activated 2h: Auto not activated 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimCabinTempDisplayUnit
Data.Comment: 0b : display mode in °C 1b : display mode in °F

Data.Name: OLN_ClimClearnessDisplay
Data.Comment: 0h: No display 1h: Clearness ON 2h: Clearness OFF 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimDriverZoneDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Driver zone ON 0b10: Driver zone OFF 0b11: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimEVHeaterDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: EV heater ON 0b10: EV heater OFF 0b11: Not Used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimForcedFreshDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Fresh ON 0b10: Fresh OFF 0b11: Not Used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimForcedRecyDisplay
Data.Comment: 0h: No display 1h: Recycling On 2h: Recycling OFF 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimFrontDefrostDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Front defrost ON 0b10: Front defrost OFF 0b11: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimHeatedSteeringWheelDisplay
Data.Comment: 0h: No Display 1h: Heated Steering Wheel ON 2h: Heated Steering Wheel OFF 3h: Not Used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimHeatedSteerWheelAutoDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Heated steering wheel Auto ON 0b10: Heated steering wheel Auto OFF 0b11: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimOFFModeDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b0 : No Display 0b1: OFF Mode Activated Display

Data.Name: OLN_ClimRearDefrostDisplay
Data.Comment: 0h: No display 1h: Rear defrost ON 2h: Rear defrost OFF 3h: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_ClimRightBlowingLevelDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b0000: No Request 0b0001: Level 1 0b0010: Level 2 0b0011: Level 3 0b0100: Level 4 0b0101: Level 5 0b0110: Level 6 0b0111: Level 7 0b1000: Level 8 0b1001: Level 9 0b1010: Level 10 0b1011: Level 11 0b1100: Level 12 0b1101: Level 13 0b1110: Level 14 0b1111: Blower OFF

Data.Name: OLN_ClimRightFlowDistrDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b000: No request 0b001: Feet 0b010: Vent 0b011: Vent + Feet 0b100: Defrost 0b101: Defrost + Feet 0b110: Defrost + Vent 0b111: Defrost + Vent + Feet

Data.Name: OLN_ClimSyncDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Sync mode ON 0b10: Sync mode OFF 0b11: Not Used

Data.Name: OLN_FrontLeftSeatAutoDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Seat Auto ON 0b10: Seat Auto OFF 0b11: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_FrontLeftSeatStatus
Data.Comment: 0b000: Unavailable 0b001: OFF display 0b010: Heater Low display 0b011: Heater Middle display 0b100: Heater High display 0b101: Ventilated Low display 0b110: Ventilated Middle display 0b111: Ventilated High display

Data.Name: OLN_FrontRightSeatAutoDisplay
Data.Comment: 0b00: No display 0b01: Seat Auto ON 0b10: Seat Auto OFF 0b11: Not used

Data.Name: OLN_FrontRightSeatStatus
Data.Comment: 0b000: Unavailable 0b001: OFF display 0b010: Heater Low display 0b011: Heater Middle display 0b100: Heater High display 0b101: Ventilated Low display 0b110: Ventilated Middle display 0b111: Ventilated High display

Data.Name: OLN_HVPTCbatt_FaultType
Data.Comment: 00d: No failure and HV PTC ON 01d: No failure and HV PTC OFF 02d: Downgraded mode for HV PTC 03d: Failure mode for HV PTC 04d: To Change HV PTC 05d: Not Used 06d: Not Used 07d: Unavailable

Item.Text: No failure and HV PTC ON
No failure and HV PTC OFF

Data.Name: OLN_IoniserAutoLaunchState
Data.Comment: 0h: Unavailable 1h: Auto launch activated 2h: Auto launch not activated 3h: Not Used

Data.Name: OLN_SecondRowLeftSeatStatus
Data.Comment: 0b000 : Unvailable 0b001 : OFF display 0b010 : Heater Low display 0b011 : Heater Middle display 0b100 : Heater High display 0b101 : Ventilated Low display 0b110 : Ventilated Middle display 0b111 : Ventilated High display

Data.Name: OLN_SecondRowRightSeatStatus
Data.Comment: 0b000 : Unvailable 0b001 : OFF display 0b010 : Heater Low display 0b011 : Heater Middle display 0b100 : Heater High display 0b101 : Ventilated Low display 0b110 : Ventilated Middle display 0b111 : Ventilated High display

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: VL_GADEForClim
Data.Comment: 0d: Sleep or crank fault 1d: AutoACC fault 2d: All fault, disable DiagMuxDTC 3d: All fault, enable DiagMuxDTC 4d-6d: Not used 7h: Unavailable

Label.Text: Hot Source Temp setpoint [°C] send to Pacbox
LV PTC number send to Pacbox
Hot Source Temp before Air PTC value [°C]
Engine Fan speed Status from USM
LV PTC number send to Pacbox
LV PTC number status from BCM
Heat Loop Coolant temp from sensor [°C]
Heat Loop Pump status from HEVC
Engine Fan speed Status from USM
Engine Fan speed Status from USM
Engine Fan speed Status from USM
Engine Fan speed Status from USM
Storage Max Power For Batt Cond [W]
Engine Fan speed Status from USM
Battery Cooling Control Type to HPM
Storage Max Power For Batt Cond [W]
Heat Loop Coolant temp from sensor [°C]
Heat Loop Pump status from HEVC
LV PTC number send to Pacbox
LV PTC number status from BCM
